holdings.infoBox: SMOG is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 8.47%, Tesla at 7.51%, NextEra Energy at 7.07%, Iberdrola at 7.01%, and Enel SpA at 6.36%.

overview.description: The VanEck Low Carbon Energy ETF (SMOG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Low Carbon Energy index, a market-cap-weighted index of companies that focuses specifically on renewable energy SMOG was launched on May 3, 2007 and is issued by VanEck.

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Tesla’s Record Run Clears the Air for ‘SMOG’ ETF
data.text: The ETF industry has something for everyone -- the VanEck Vectors Low Carbon Energy ETF (ticker: SMOG) tracks companies primarily engaged in the business of alternative energy.
